items.title: Exploitation of KnowledgeDeliver via ViewState Deserialization Vulnerability
items.summary: In late 2025, an unknown threat actor exploited a critical zero-day vulnerability in KnowledgeDeliver, a Learning Management System widely used in Japan. The issue stemmed from identical hardcoded ASP.NET machine keys distributed across multiple customer deployments
